faqs.question: What types of ants are most common in Sutton Place apartments?
faqs.answer: Sutton Place residences typically encounter pavement ants, odorous house ants, and carpenter ants. Older pre-war buildings are particularly susceptible to carpenter ants, which can damage wooden structures. Our technicians identify the specific species and customize treatment accordingly for maximum effectiveness.

Our methods are safe for families, pets, and won't damage fine furnishings, artwork, or finishes common in Sutton Place homes. We also offer completely organic options upon request.
